---
title: "Proposal"
---

::: {.page-intro}
[Project Proposal]{.muted-label}

This proposal outlines why Sailor Shift and Oceanus Folk form a compelling visual analytics case study, what analytical challenge the project addresses, and which objectives guide the development of the final system.
:::

::: {.proposal-grid}
::: {.proposal-card}
## Motivation

We were motivated by the challenge of making sense of complex music ecosystems where influence, collaboration, and popularity evolve together over time. Sailor Shift's rise offers an ideal case study for exploring how a single artist can both emerge from and reshape a genre community.

Using core practices of visual analytics can reveal patterns that would be difficult to see in raw semi-structured data alone, such as career inflection points, cross-genre influence flows, collaboration-driven growth, and early signals of future breakout artists.
:::

::: {.proposal-card}
## Problem Statement

Although the semi-structured data contains rich information about artists, releases, genres, collaborations, and influence relationships, it is difficult to directly answer higher-level questions from the raw data alone.

The main challenge is to transform this complex, time-varying relational data into interpretable visual forms that support both focused inquiry about Sailor Shift and broader analysis of Oceanus Folk as an evolving musical community.
:::
:::

::: {.section-intro}
[Project Goals]{.muted-label}

## Proposal Objectives

The objective of this project is to design and develop visualisations that allow users to explore Sailor Shift's career, understand the spread and evolution of Oceanus Folk, and identify artist characteristics associated with breakout success. We tackle this through 5 analysis objectives that guide our data preprocessing, network construction, and visualisation development.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="accordion proposal-accordion" id="proposalObjectivesAccordion">
  <div class="accordion-item">
    <h2 class="accordion-header" id="objectiveOneHeading">
      <button class="accordion-button" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#objectiveOne" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="objectiveOne">
        <span class="objective-number">01</span>
        <span>Sailor Shift Career Trajectory Analysis</span>
      </button>
    </h2>
    <div id="objectiveOne" class="accordion-collapse collapse show" aria-labelledby="objectiveOneHeading" data-bs-parent="#proposalObjectivesAccordion">
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <p>This analysis examines the temporal development of Sailor Shift's career, including periods of emergence, breakthrough, consolidation, and expansion. By modelling her release history, popularity trends, genre transitions, and collaboration activity as a chronological trajectory, we reveal how her career evolved from local beginnings to global recognition. The career trajectory serves as the foundational baseline that all subsequent analyses contextualise and build upon.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="accordion-item">
    <h2 class="accordion-header" id="objectiveTwoHeading">
      <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#objectiveTwo" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="objectiveTwo">
        <span class="objective-number">02</span>
        <span>Sailor Shift Influence and Lineage Analysis</span>
      </button>
    </h2>
    <div id="objectiveTwo" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="objectiveTwoHeading" data-bs-parent="#proposalObjectivesAccordion">
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <p>This analysis examines the lineage of artistic influence within the music ecosystem, considering both incoming and outgoing influences surrounding Sailor Shift. By tracing who shaped her artistic development and which artists or communities she later influenced, we map the flow of creative inspiration through the network. This reveals how influence propagates across genres and generations, and positions Sailor Shift within a broader web of musical heritage and cultural impact.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="accordion-item">
    <h2 class="accordion-header" id="objectiveThreeHeading">
      <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#objectiveThree" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="objectiveThree">
        <span class="objective-number">03</span>
        <span>Sailor Shift Collaboration and Network Analysis</span>
      </button>
    </h2>
    <div id="objectiveThree" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="objectiveThreeHeading" data-bs-parent="#proposalObjectivesAccordion">
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <p>This analysis examines how collaboration networks, band affiliations, and production relationships contribute to visibility, career momentum, and cross-community influence. By analysing who Sailor Shift worked with, when these collaborations occurred, and how they intersect with broader network structures, we uncover the role of working relationships in her rise and in the wider spread of Oceanus Folk across different musical communities.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="accordion-item">
    <h2 class="accordion-header" id="objectiveFourHeading">
      <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#objectiveFour" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="objectiveFour">
        <span class="objective-number">04</span>
        <span>Oceanus Folk Genre Diffusion and Evolution Analysis</span>
      </button>
    </h2>
    <div id="objectiveFour" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="objectiveFourHeading" data-bs-parent="#proposalObjectivesAccordion">
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <p>This analysis explores the outward diffusion of Oceanus Folk across artists and genres, as well as the inward evolution of the genre itself. By measuring how far and how fast Oceanus Folk's musical DNA spread into other genres over time, and by examining which external genres fed back into Oceanus Folk, we reveal the bidirectional cultural exchange that transformed a local tradition into a globally recognised sound.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="accordion-item">
    <h2 class="accordion-header" id="objectiveFiveHeading">
      <button class="accordion-button collapsed" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#objectiveFive" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="objectiveFive">
        <span class="objective-number">05</span>
        <span>Emerging Artist and Rising Star Analysis</span>
      </button>
    </h2>
    <div id="objectiveFive" class="accordion-collapse collapse" aria-labelledby="objectiveFiveHeading" data-bs-parent="#proposalObjectivesAccordion">
      <div class="accordion-body">
        <p>This analysis identifies characteristics associated with breakout success by comparing artist trajectories, network patterns, and influence dynamics across the Oceanus Folk ecosystem. By extracting features related to popularity growth, network position, genre breadth, and influence, we define a data-driven profile of a rising star and apply it to evaluate emerging artists, predicting which ones are most likely to achieve similar success in the coming years.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

::: {.section-intro}
[Project Timeline]{.muted-label}

## Timeline and milestone plan

The schedule below reconstructs the project plan from the proposal timeline, showing how exploration, analysis, deliverables, and meetings progress from Week 9 to Week 14.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="timeline-shell">
  <div class="timeline-legend">
    <span class="timeline-legend-item"><span class="timeline-swatch phase-exploration"></span>Exploration</span>
    <span class="timeline-legend-item"><span class="timeline-swatch phase-analysis"></span>Analysis</span>
    <span class="timeline-legend-item"><span class="timeline-swatch phase-deliverable"></span>Deliverables</span>
    <span class="timeline-legend-item"><span class="timeline-swatch phase-meeting"></span>Meetings</span>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-header-row">
    <div class="timeline-task-heading">Task</div>
    <div class="timeline-week-heading">W9<span>9 Mar - 15 Mar</span></div>
    <div class="timeline-week-heading">W10<span>16 Mar - 22 Mar</span></div>
    <div class="timeline-week-heading">W11<span>23 Mar - 29 Mar</span></div>
    <div class="timeline-week-heading">W12<span>30 Mar - 5 Apr</span></div>
    <div class="timeline-week-heading">W13<span>6 Apr - 12 Apr</span></div>
    <div class="timeline-week-heading">W14<span>13 Apr - 19 Apr</span></div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-group-title">Project Exploration</div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Guidelines, overview, and theme selection</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-exploration" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Draft proposal completion</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-exploration" style="grid-column: 1 / span 1;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Website, repository, consultation, and scope finalization</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-exploration" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-group-title">Analysis of Data</div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Preliminary EDA and data familiarization</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-analysis" style="grid-column: 2 / span 1;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Career trajectory, influence, and collaboration analysis</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-analysis" style="grid-column: 2 / span 3;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Genre diffusion, stylistic evolution, and rising-star analysis</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-analysis" style="grid-column: 3 / span 2;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-group-title">Deliverables Preparation</div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Website refinement and visualization guide</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-deliverable" style="grid-column: 2 / span 4;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Poster development and final presentation materials</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-deliverable" style="grid-column: 4 / span 2;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Meeting minutes and final project artifacts</div>
    <div class="timeline-track">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-deliverable" style="grid-column: 1 / span 6;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-group-title">Meetings</div>

  <div class="timeline-row">
    <div class="timeline-label">Milestone meetings with project stakeholders</div>
    <div class="timeline-track timeline-track--meetings">
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-meeting timeline-bar--milestone" style="grid-column: 1;"></span>
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-meeting timeline-bar--milestone" style="grid-column: 2;"></span>
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-meeting timeline-bar--milestone" style="grid-column: 3;"></span>
      <span class="timeline-bar phase-meeting timeline-bar--milestone" style="grid-column: 4;"></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```
